caveat: The 50-step training-loss history for the pooled-physics smoke: the loss reaches ~0.013 by step 10 and stays there -- step-50/step-10 ratio 1.0036 against the <0.85 descent gate; the wiggle is noise around a flat line, not descent. This is the one per-step trajectory that was logged: the per-step mean flux was NOT (its per-variant step-50 endpoints, all 1.000, are in fig1/fig2a) -- so the tell is cited as endpoints, and only this loss curve is drawn. Single realization / fixed cosmology; z=0.3 scope-lock.
mean_flux_trace: NOT logged per step; per-variant endpoints only (see fig1/fig2a)
